content.text: Use one bash command to create connectivity.txt containing exactly 'skillrace pi ok', then stop.

content.thinking:
The user wants me to use one bash command to create a file called "connectivity.txt" containing exactly the text "skillrace pi ok", and then stop.

I can use the bash command with echo to create this file. The command would be:
`echo "skillrace pi ok" > connectivity.txt`

This will create the file and write the exact content to it.
